'''lachodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:liver|liver]]". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-ch-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:liver|liver]]
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| lachodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:læchedeth|læchedeth]] || [[word:læchedej|læchedej]] || [[word:læchedesh|læchedesh]] || [[word:læchede|læchede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lachochodoth|lachochodoth]] || [[word:lachochodoj|lachochodoj]] || [[word:lachochodosh|lachochodosh]] || [[word:lachochodo|lachochodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lachodoth|lachodoth]] || [[word:lachodoj|lachodoj]] || [[word:lachodosh|lachodosh]] || [[word:lachodo|lachodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lachofdoth|lachofdoth]] || [[word:lachofdoj|lachofdoj]] || [[word:lachofdosh|lachofdosh]] || [[word:lachofdof|lachofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lachodotho|lachodotho]] || [[word:lachodojo|lachodojo]] || [[word:lachodosho|lachodosho]] || [[word:lachodoko|lachodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lachodoth|lachodoth]] || [[word:lachodoj|lachodoj]] || [[word:lachodosh|lachodosh]] || [[word:lachodo|lachodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lachodothol|lachodothol]] || [[word:lachodojol|lachodojol]] || [[word:lachodoshol|lachodoshol]] || [[word:lachodokol|lachodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lachodothotho|lachodothotho]] || [[word:lachodojojo|lachodojojo]] || [[word:lachodoshosho|lachodoshosho]] || [[word:lachodoko|lachodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lachodothon|lachodothon]] || [[word:lachodojon|lachodojon]] || [[word:lachodoshon|lachodoshon]] || [[word:lachodokon|lachodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lachodothoro|lachodothoro]] || [[word:lachodojoro|lachodojoro]] || [[word:lachodoshoro|lachodoshoro]] || [[word:lachodokoro|lachodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
